title: genQC
summary: Generative Quantum Circuits. This is the main public repository for the current quantum research line.
focus: Quantum circuits, generative modeling, research prototypes

title: vqls-prototype
summary: A compact Qiskit-based VQLS prototype, useful as a small example project with runnable source files.

title: Variational Quantum Linear Solver
summary: A public VQLS repository that can be browsed as an independent project from the personal site.
focus: Variational quantum algorithms and linear systems

title: Quantum-Computing
summary: A broader public notebook and note repository for quantum computing material.
focus: Quantum computing notes, examples, and experiments
